title: Create : Cosmos
description: A Create + Valkyrian Skies centered modpack with Tacz Zero and Farmer's delight ! (Custom recipes for the guns and custom mods for more smooth upgrades will come... maybe...)
body:
---

## About the Modpack

This modpack is meant to offer a bit of everything: tech, exploration, farming, and adventure. You can build huge machines, explore insane landscapes, or just chill and cook food. It’s really up to you.

---

## Tech & Vehicles

The main focus is around Create and its addons like Clockwork, Valkyrian Skies, VS Tournament, Create Diesel Generators, Create Big Cannons and Create Northstar.

With these, you can build real moving machines and vehicles like this plane or tank with actual physics.

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Hao7s2urVBw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UHUA05re2NY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Food & Farming

If you just want to relax, there’s a lot of food content with more than 1700 items.

This mainly comes from Farmer's Delight and its addons, along with Let's Do: Vinery for wine and Let's Do: Brewery for beer with real effects.

You can farm, cook, and try a huge variety of recipes.

---

## World & Exploration

JJ Thunder To The Max changes the terrain generation with massive mountains and impressive landscapes.

⚠️ **Important:** The Twilight Forest is **not included by default**.
You need to install it manually using this exact version:
twilightforest-1.20.1-4.3.2508-universal.jar

This is because the mod is hosted on CurseForge and cannot be directly included in a Modrinth modpack.
Download it here:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

---

## Combat

Timeless and Classics Zero adds a wide range of firearms and improves combat. You can see it here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/g0BLqAi3WpY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The modpack also includes Cracker's Wither Storm Mod. It is disabled by default but can be enabled if you want a much harder and more chaotic boss experience.

If you want a more military-style experience, I recommend adding:

Drive-by-Wire
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drive-by-wire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drive-by-wire)

Create: No Touching
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-no-touching](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-no-touching)

These work really well with the vehicle and weapon systems already in the pack.

---

## World Life

Several mods improve the environment and make the world feel more alive, including Alex's Caves, Alex's Mobs, Aquaculture 2, Biomes O' Plenty and Ribbits.

You can see Alex's Caves here:

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3_JF98zlEAI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Origins

With Origins and Origins++, you can choose a race with unique abilities and weaknesses, or just play normally.

If you don’t know how it works, you can check this:

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eWnStIJxg5Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Overall

You can focus on building machines, exploring, fighting bosses, farming, or just relaxing. The modpack is designed so you can play however you want.

---
